# Electro Oxidation

**Summary**: A process that uses electricity to oxidize organic pollutants in water.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-al-aqeel|Al-Aqeel, 2023]] used electro-oxidation to treat spent caustic waste and reduce COD levels.
